name: Harvest Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, cook onion in butter until tender but not brown.
2. Stir in poultry seasoning, salt, cinnamon, and pepper.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine bread cubes, apple, walnuts, and wheat germ.
4. Add the cooked onions to the mixture.
5. Drizzle with enough chicken broth to moisten, tossing lightly.
6. Use to stuff a 10 lb turkey.
